r1.name: Sarah K.
r1.text: This is the most accurate reading I've ever seen. It described my personality so precisely it was almost scary.

r2.name: Emily R.
r2.text: I was skeptical at first, but the compatibility reading matched my relationship patterns exactly. Highly recommend.

r3.name: Mia L.
r3.text: The yearly forecast predicted key events in my life with surprising accuracy. This is my go-to app now.
